notes: Implemented YOLOv5 core modules from scratch. utils/metrics.py provides fitness, smooth, compute_ap, box_iou, ConfusionMatrix. utils/general.py provides is_ascii, check_img_size, xyxy2xywh, xywh2xyxy, intersect_dicts, non_max_suppression. models/common.py provides Conv, Bottleneck, C3, SPPF, Concat building blocks. models/yolo.py provides Detect head and Model class that parses YAML configs to build the network architecture.
